qa.title: Quality Engineering
qa.subtitle: Philosophy, strategy, and evidence from real projects.
qa.approach: Quality Engineering is a design discipline, not a testing phase. I believe in shift-left thinking — finding issues before they become bugs, building testability into architecture, and using automation to amplify human judgment, not replace it.
qa.scorecard-desc: A layered assessment of the Diploma Tracking System (DTS), a real full-stack academic platform I work on.
qa.layer-ui-detail: Playwright E2E suite with page objects, auth fixtures, and business-flow tests. Covers login, dashboard, RBAC navigation, student progress. Expanding coverage.
qa.layer-api-detail: Integration + smoke + exploratory tests covering auth, RBAC, student flows, admin flows, enrollment rules, and data isolation. 15 route files, consistent JWT + Zod pattern.
qa.layer-db-detail: Supabase RLS policies tested via API layer. Direct DB integration tests via Supabase client. Migration-based schema with audit logging.
qa.layer-cicd-detail: 6 GitHub Actions workflows: typecheck + unit + API on push, daily smoke, weekly regression with Playwright video, production validation, UX guard.
qa.evidence-desc: Real bug findings from a production web application tested with Playwright, Cucumber, and Allure Reports — integrated with Jira for traceability.
qa.evidence-allure-smoke: Allure smoke test report — automated test suite results overview
qa.evidence-allure-tests: Allure test details — test cases with steps, parameters, and history
qa.evidence-jira-board: Jira board — QA workflow integration with traceability
qa.evidence-bug1: App shell with sidebar — layout integrity check
qa.evidence-bug2: Multi-tab navigation — state consistency across tabs
qa.evidence-bug3: TC-10: Not found state — missing 404 handling on invalid routes
qa.cta: Want to discuss how I can improve your team's quality?
